title: athlete-enrollment — subprocessors
description: The AthleteEnrollment module engages ZERO third-party subprocessors — every state transition is first-party. Downstream: notifications, storage (Wave 4+), finance (Wave 4+ for payment status).

downstream_subprocessors_referenced.used_for: Payment collection integration for enrollment fees.

notes: GDPR Art. 30 requires this record even when empty.
